name: Chicken and Yellow Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Use chicken pieces as desired.
2. Fry the chicken in olive oil with onions and garlic until browned on both sides.
3. Add tomatoes and water to the pan. Bring to a boil.
4. Reduce heat to medium-low and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in bay leaves, salt, saffron, green pepper, paprika, and cornstarch. Cook for about 15 minutes.
6. Mix in the rice and cook for another 25 minutes, adding water as needed to prevent it from drying out.
7. Add peas and pimientos, then cook for an additional 10 minutes.
